data.tech-challenge: Radical transformation of the production model, from user stories to quality testing.
data.tech-objectives:
• Short term: team training, skills assessment, methodical identification of individual adapting profiles
  • Medium term: as technology allows, complete replacement of the production model
data.tech-earlywins: Launched at the beginning of Q1 2026. Key milestone: Tech talk at the convention, concurrent with Claude releases multiplying real operational uses.
data.cs-challenge: Real AI/Human association, supervised AI model, for superior customer experience — complete elimination of delays, 24/7 availability. The objective is, in the very short term, a superior customer experience despite the current limits of AI.
data.cs-earlywins: Deployment of the central tool (AI-assisted chatbot / Gleap)
data.sales-objectives:
• Reinforcement of the ops/AI function
  • Lead preparation optimization
  • AI outbound (email, voice)
  • Process automation, alerting
data.mkt-challenge: Somewhere between internal transformation and communication/marketing.
data.mkt-objectives:
• Process structuring, output acceleration
  • Custom lead nurturing
  • Agentization: translation, design, project management
  • Brand visibility in the AI ecosystem
data.ops-objectives:
• Education & training for teams
  • Data management
  • Process identification and automation
  • Talent & AI-match
  • Working culture & rituals
